ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the conversation belongs to */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker in the conversation */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript associated with the conversation */,
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corpus the conversation belongs to */,
  "media_start" REAL /* Start time of the conversation in seconds */,
  "media_end" REAL /* End time of the conversation in seconds */,
  "media_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for media timestamps (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  "recording_format" TEXT /* Format of the recording (e.g., MP3, WAV) */,
  "recording_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recording (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date of the recording */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the recording was made */,
  "recording_duration" REAL /* Duration of the recording in seconds */,
  "recording_transcribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who transcribed the recording */,
  "recording_transcription_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was transcribed */,
  "recording_transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_corpus_id FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_id") REFERENCES corpora ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_code" TEXT /* Code for the speaker (e.g., VIR, RAC) */,
  "speaker_role" TEXT /* Role of the speaker (e.g., Investigator, Child) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the speaker */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the speaker */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the speaker */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the speaker */,
  "additional_languages" TEXT /* Additional languages spoken by the speaker */,
  "speaker_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the transcript belongs to */,
  "transcript_text" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  "transcription_method" TEXT /* Method used for transcription (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "transcription_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the transcription (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "transcription_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcription was performed */,
  "transcription_duration" REAL /* Duration of the transcription process in minutes */,
  "transcription_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the transcription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corpora" (
  "corpus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corpus */,
  "corpus_name" TEXT /* Name of the corpus */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the corpus (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  "corpus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the corpus in number of recordings */,
  "corpus_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the corpus */,
  "corpus_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the corpus */,
  "corpus_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was created */,
  "corpus_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the corpus was last updated */,
  "corpus_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the corpus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corpus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corpora_corpus_creator FOREIGN KEY ("corpus_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "collection_size" INTEGER /* Size of the collection in number of recordings */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the collection */,
  "collection_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "collection_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was created */,
  "collection_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was last updated */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_collection_creator FOREIGN KEY ("collection_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utterances" (
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utterance */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the utterance belongs to */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who made the utterance */,
  "utterance_order" INTEGER /* Order of the utterance in the conversation */,
  "gloss" TEXT /* Gloss of the utterance */,
  "stem" TEXT /* Stem of the utterance */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the utterance */,
  "num_tokens" INTEGER /* Number of tokens in the utterance */,
  "num_morphemes" INTEGER /* Number of morphemes in the utterance */,
  "utterance_type" TEXT /* Type of the utterance (e.g., declarative, interrogative) */,
  "utterance_language" TEXT /* Language of the utterance */,
  "utterance_context" TEXT /* Context in which the utterance was made */,
  "utterance_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the utterance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utterance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utterances_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "morphemes" (
  "morpheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each morpheme */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utterance the morpheme belongs to */,
  "morpheme" TEXT /* Text of the morpheme */,
  "morpheme_type" TEXT /* Type of the morpheme (e.g., root, affix) */,
  "morpheme_language" TEXT /* Language of the morpheme */,
  "morpheme_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the morpheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("morpheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_morphemes_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token */,
  "utterance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utterance the token belongs to */,
  "token" TEXT /* Text of the token */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of the token (e.g., word, punctuation) */,
  "token_language" TEXT /* Language of the token */,
  "token_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tokens_utterance_id FOREIGN KEY ("utterance_id") REFERENCES utterances ("utterance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "child_name" TEXT /* Name of the child */,
  "child_age" INTEGER /* Age of the child */,
  "child_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the child */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who is the child */,
  "child_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the child */,
  "child_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the child */,
  "child_language_background" TEXT /* Language background of the child */,
  "child_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who is the investigator */,
  "investigator_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the investigator */,
  "investigator_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the investigator */,
  "investigator_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigators_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., syntax, semantics) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_duration" REAL /* Duration of the analysis process in minutes */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_analysis_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "permission_granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "permission_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "permission_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "permission_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_permission_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("permission_granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)
